name: Pineapple-Carrot Jam
recipeIngredient: 1 can (20 oz) crushed pineapple, undrained and unsweetened
4 medium Carrots (2 cups), peeled and grated
1 Lemon peel, removed with vegetable peeler
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except lemon juice in a 2-quart saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce heat and simmer for 25-30 minutes, stirring occasionally until the mixture thickens to the consistency of applesauce and the pineapple is translucent.
3. Stir in lemon juice.
4. Pack into hot jars, cover completely, and cool. Store refrigerated for up to 1 month.
